title.en: A simple Dashboard with Tailwind CSS
title.es: Un dashboard sencillo en Tailwind CSS

description.en: Build a responsive dashboard with HTML and Tailwind CSS that shows KPIs, drivers, and operational details so the artist can oversee their ticket business. Semantic HTML, responsive layout; HTML and Tailwind only (no React).
description.es: Crea un dashboard responsivo con HTML y Tailwind CSS que muestre KPIs, drivers y detalles operativos para que el artista supervise su negocio de entradas. HTML semántico, diseño responsivo; solo HTML y Tailwind (sin React).

sharing.en: I just completed A simple Dashboard with Tailwind CSS with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Check it out: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/simple-dashboard-tailwind-css #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #html #css #accessibility
sharing.es: Acabo de completar Un dashboard sencillo en Tailwind CSS con LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Mira el proyecto: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/simple-dashboard-tailwind-css #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #html #css #accessibility

sharing.en: Built and shipped: A simple Dashboard with Tailwind CSS. Learning by building with @4GeeksAcademy. https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/simple-dashboard-tailwind-css #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #html #css #accessibility
